use tree_sitter::{Parser, Node};

fn walk_nested(node: Node, source: &str) {
    for i in 0..node.child_count() {
        if let Some(child) = node.child(i) {
            let text = child.utf8_text(source.as_bytes()).unwrap();
            for j in 0..child.child_count() {
                if let Some(grandchild) = child.child(j) {
                    let text2 = grandchild.utf8_text(source.as_bytes()).unwrap();
                    let text_again = child.utf8_text(source.as_bytes()).unwrap();
                    println!("parent: {}, child: {}", text_again, text2);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

fn collect_texts(node: Node, source: &str) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    let mut cursor = node.walk();
    for child in node.named_children(&mut cursor) {
        let text = child.utf8_text(source.as_bytes()).unwrap();
        for grandchild in child.named_children(&mut cursor) {
            let gt = grandchild.utf8_text(source.as_bytes()).unwrap();
            let parent_text = child.utf8_text(source.as_bytes()).unwrap();
            results.push(format!("{}:{}", parent_text, gt));
        }
    }
    results
}
